plugins.name: gog
plugins.description: Use the gog CLI to interact with Google Workspace services (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Chat, Tasks, Classroom, Contacts)

plugins.name: xai
plugins.description: Use the xai CLI to search X posts, browse user timelines, retrieve threads, discover trending topics, and perform web searches via the xAI API

plugins.name: cli-inspector
plugins.description: Investigate CLI tools by discovering command trees via recursive --help execution and inspecting source repos

plugins.name: fam
plugins.description: Use the fam CLI to manage and track financial assets across MoneyForward, Coincheck, and Binance
